rural_min_site_area: Shall not normally be less than 0.2 hectares (Zoned A — Agricultural)
plot_ratio: City Centre 2:1; Outer Suburbs (residential) 0.46:1; CI 1.25:1; I 1.00:1; Salthill (CI) 1.75:1
site_coverage_pct: CI zone max 0.80 (80%); I zone max 0.80 (80%)
separation_distance_m: Min 11 m between units and private open space/development-potential land above ground floor; min 1.5 m side gable to boundary
private_open_space: Min 50% of gross floor area per unit (excl. car spaces)
public_open_space_pct: Communal open space 15% of gross site area (min 10% public open space on small infill)
car_parking_dwelling: Outer Suburbs 2 on-site + 1 visitor per 3 dwellings (or 1+1 per dwelling); Inner Residential max 1 per dwelling; 3 spaces for dwellings >200 m²
trigger_AA: Required where plan/project may have significant adverse effects on European Sites; screening determines Stage 2 AA / NIS
trigger_EIA: Mandatory thresholds per P&D Regulations 2001–2015; sub-threshold discretionary where significant effect likely; required for major quarry/extractive operations
trigger_FRA: Site-specific FRA for development in Flood Zones A or B; must demonstrate no increased risk; climate change and residual risk incorporated
trigger_AHIA: Built Heritage Impact Assessment for Protected Structures and development in ACAs
trigger_EcIA: For developments in areas supporting protected species/biodiversity features
trigger_TTA: Required for significant trip-generation; threshold >100 employees, all schools, residential 100+ dwellings
notes: Fuel filling stations: access not within 35 m of road junction; frontage min 20 m; pumps min 5 m setback. Also Noise Assessment, Scheme Sustainability Statement (25+ homes/>500 m²/>1,000 m²), Design Statement (sites over 1 ha).
